# Activity Pattern Catalog

<!-- Версия: 1.0 | Обновлено: 2026-04-27 | Платформа: BPMSoft 1.9 -->
<!-- Теги: Activity patterns, Email patterns, process user tasks -->

> Каталог реальных Activity/Email-паттернов из `Autogenerated/Src`.

## Activity schema

**Файл:** `Autogenerated/Src/ActivitySchema.Base.cs`

Паттерны:

- unified entity для task/call/appointment/email;
- owner/author/organizer;
- reminders;
- email-specific columns;
- `ShowInScheduler`.

## Activity constants

**Файл:** `Autogenerated/Src/ActivityConsts.Base.cs`

Паттерны:

- GUID roles From/To/CC/BCC;
- activity type/status/category;
- email send statuses;
- message direction.

## Activity lifecycle

**Файл:** `Autogenerated/Src/Activity.Base.cs`

Паттерны:

- saving/saved split;
- duration calculation;
- preview and mail hash;
- email participant sync;
- owner/contact participants for non-email activity.

## Email participants

**Файл:** `Autogenerated/Src/EmailParticipantHelper.Base.cs`

Паттерны:

- parse formatted email strings;
- remove duplicate addresses;
- map emails to contacts;
- create `ActivityParticipant`;
- set `SenderContact`.

## Email sending

**Файл:** `Autogenerated/Src/EmailSender.Base.cs`

Паттерны:

- `IEmailSender` default binding;
- `EmailSender`, `HtmlEmailMessageSender`, `ActivityEmailSender`;
- inline images and attachments;
- send status transitions;
- `ErrorOnSend`.

## Process email tasks

**Файлы:** `EmailTemplateUserTask.ProcessDesigner.cs`, `SendEmailUserTaskSchema.ProcessDesigner.cs`

Паттерны:

- template email with macros;
- plain send email task;
- process attachments via `EntityFileLocator`;
- `ActivityId` and execution data.

## Activity participants schema

**Файл:** `Autogenerated/Src/ActivityParticipantSchema.IntegrationV2.cs`

Паттерны:

- schema extension by integration package;
- default role override;
- participant EventsProcess.

## Email UI

**Файлы:** `EmailPageV2.UIv2.js`, `EmailFileDetailV2.UIv2.js`

Паттерны:

- send/reply/forward button state;
- mailbox sender list;
- HTML editor and `IsHtmlBody`;
- email-specific file detail.

## Mailbox sync

**Файл:** `Autogenerated/Src/MailboxSyncSettingsSchema.ExchangeListener.cs`

Паттерны:

- mailbox owner by current user;
- sync period defaults;
- flags for synchronization behavior;
- EventsProcess on mailbox settings.
